PostToolUse.command: cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR && if ls lib/**/*.g.dart 1>/dev/null 2>&1; then dart format -l 80 $(echo $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS | tr ',' ' ') 2>/dev/null; dart analyze . --no-fatal-infos 2>&1 | head -20; fi
cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR && flutter test "$(echo $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS | tr ',' '\n' | grep '_test\.dart$' | head -1)" 2>&1 | tail -30
